task_completion.description: Agent logged into the Rancher dashboard
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rancher web interface is visible in the browser, indicating successful login.

task_completion.description: The api-server deployment is compliant and its pods are running
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Rancher UI, the 'api-server' deployment in the 'secure-apps' namespace shows a green/active status with running pods (e.g., 1/1), indicating the security context was fixed.

task_completion.description: The worker deployment is compliant and its pods are running
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Rancher UI, the 'worker' deployment in the 'secure-apps' namespace shows a green/active status with running pods.

task_completion.description: The frontend deployment is compliant and its pods are running
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Rancher UI, the 'frontend' deployment in the 'secure-apps' namespace shows a green/active status with running pods.

task_completion.description: The logger deployment is compliant and its pods are running
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Rancher UI, the 'logger' deployment in the 'secure-apps' namespace shows a green/active status with running pods.

task_completion.description: The namespace enforcement label was not removed
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'secure-apps' namespace configuration or labels in Rancher still show 'pod-security.kubernetes.io/enforce: restricted'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Rancher GUI to modify the deployments
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the Rancher web interface (e.g., using the 'Edit YAML' or form views in Rancher) rather than exclusively using a terminal.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent using 'kubectl edit' or 'kubectl apply' in a terminal window to fix the deployments.

integrity.description: Agent actually modified the securityContext of the deployments
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the deployment YAML or configuration should show actual additions of securityContext fields (like runAsNonRoot, allowPrivilegeEscalation: false, etc.) rather than just deleting and recreating pods without fixes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target namespace is 'secure-apps'. The four deployments that must be fixed are 'api-server', 'worker', 'frontend', and 'logger'. A reference file for compliance is located at '/home/ga/Desktop/psa_compliance_reference.md'.
